Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "KUNGFUMASTER-0400-8000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Kung-Fu Master.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly. The loading screen is from the disk version.
